results.title: Minnesota Imam Says They Are Here to Replace Americans – Discern Report
results.description: In this Independent Sentinel article, M Dowling highlights a Minnesota imam’s declaration that Muslims are in America to replace Americans, urging them to rise to leadership positions through education and civic engagement as their “moment” arrives. Speaking at an Islamic Center in Bloomington, the imam cited New York’s Muslim mayor as evidence of growing influence [...] The post Minnesota Imam Says They Are Here to Replace Americans – Discern Report appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Suvendu Adhikari Vows Tough Action in Student Death Case
results.description: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari promised stringent action, invoking the Goonda law and seeking capital punishment for those responsible for the explosion that killed a Class 4 student during a TMC victory procession.

results.title: Why Do Jews Keep Voting for Leftists Who Hate Them? – Discern Report
results.description: In this American Thinker article, Elise Cooper reviews Batya Ungar-Sargon’s book *The Jews and the Left*, exploring why many American Jews continue supporting leftist Democrats despite rising antisemitism on the left. Ungar-Sargon addresses the frequent question from conservatives and Christians about Jewish voting patterns favoring Democrats who increasingly tolerate or enable Jew-hatred. The book traces [...] The post Why Do Jews Keep Voting for Leftists Who Hate Them? – Discern Report appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Navigating the Helm: The Next NTPC CMD Faces Daunting Challenges in Steering India's Power Behemoth Through Energy Transition
results.description: The Search-cum-Selection Committee wrapped up interviews on July 4 for the most powerful job in India’s electricity sector. With Gurdeep Singh’s extended tenure as Chairman and Managing Director (CMD) of NTPC Limited ending on July 31...

results.title: Tom Holland reveals why he thought Christopher Nolan disliked his performance while filming The Odyssey
results.description: Tom Holland has recently opened up about an amusing BTS moment from the sets of The Odyssey. The actor revealed that he initially felt director Christopher Nolan was unhappy with his performance.

results.title: Lock Upp 2: Kashmera Shah backs mami Sunita Ahuja after she breaks down on show: 'Love you now and forever'
results.description: Sunita Ahuja broke down on Lock Upp over jail conditions and requested to leave, prompting her niece-in-law Kashmera Shah to publicly support her on Instagram and urge her to fight back.
